prompt: Studio product photograph of a brushed stainless steel 24-ounce vacuum-insulated water bottle with a black screw-top cap and integrated handle loop, standing centered on a flat light cream linen surface. The bottle's metal body shows a subtle vertical brush pattern catching directional light from camera-right, with a quiet specular highlight running down the left edge. The bottle body is COMPLETELY BLANK, UNBRANDED, with NO logos, NO etching, NO print, NO graphics, NO text anywhere — a plain unmarked mockup ready for custom branding application. Straight-on eye-level view, soft daylight, slightly desaturated palette. Documentary product-catalog feel, NOT luxury hotel-glossy, NOT bright supermarket. No condensation, no people.
